text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm on my break, taking a stroll in the central
plaza when...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's important to do more than just eat chanko.
Like, you could... Oh, I know.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You could hang from a horizontal bar and have
someone pull on your legs!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's not a bad idea! Let's see, what else is
good?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hi there, Trainer! You're just the person I
wanted to see!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: So, actually...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I have to know, Bono! What must I do to grow big
and tall?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh dear, what's this all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I want to become a cool and mighty hero! And
that's why I want to get big!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I don't care how tough the training is! I can
endure it, so please! You've gotta teach me your
ways!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Well, you've got to eat lots of food! That's the
best way for sure. ☆

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: But I already am eating a lot! I always finish everything I'm served.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
But I'm just not getting any bigger... Is there
anything I can do?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: And that's the long and short of it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
So I've been trying to come up with different
methods, but I just can't settle on what to
suggest.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer, do you have any ideas about what
she can do?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Growing bigger and taller doesn't equate to
becoming cool or mighty, though. When it comes
to what a hero truly needs...
choice_data_list: She could try building her tolerance?
Perhaps she should temper her spirit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain how it's not necessarily Biko Pegasus's
body that needs to grow bigger, but her heart
and mind.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, that makes sense! So it's not just about her
eating more, but about eating things she doesn't
like too!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Biko does tend to pile her plates up with the
foods she likes...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll get cooking with all the stuff she hates,
like celery, bell peppers, and parsley. And I'll
make them real tasty, so she'll eat up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A cloth sheet has been laid open on the rooftop,
and on it sit plates of celery tempura and stuffed
bell peppers, among various other dishes.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Trainer taught me that what a hero needs is
tolerance!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The reason I grew up big and tall is because I'm
not picky about what I eat, even if it's food I
don't like!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Uuurgh! Everything smells good, but...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Guh! A hero's path is truly steep and arduous!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You can do it, Biko! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Biko Pegasus steels herself, Hishi Akebono
happily announces that she's expanded her
cooking repertoire even more.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hmm... But how is she supposed to temper her spirit?
choice_data_list:
Maybe by learning how to endure and never
give up?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, never giving up! I know a thing or two about
that!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Sumo wrestlers cling on until the bitter end, no matter how tough the going gets! Nope, they never give up...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
No matter how big a pot of chanko they're
served!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
In other words, it's all about staying strong no
matter how difficult things get, and finishing your
food without leaving any leftovers!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yay! That's definitely something I can help her
with! Thanks for the advice, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A cloth sheet has been laid open on the rooftop,
and on it sit enough plates of food for an
enormous banquet...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
If you want to be a hero, you can't ever give up!
And there's still loads of food left, so let's clean
these plates!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Urk...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Now let's dig in! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't possibly let them eat such an excessive
amount. After telling them to wait, I invite some
other students over, and we all have a great time
finishing the food together.
